ingredients_text: 65% nut nougat filling (sugar, 35% hazelnuts, whole milk powder, cocoa butter, cocoa mass, emulsifier: lecithins (sunflower), natural vanilla flavor), 22% white chocolate (sugar, whole milk powder, cocoa butter, emulsifier: lecithins), 9% chocolate (sugar, cocoa mass, cocoa butter, whole milk powder, emulsifier: lecithins), 4% milk chocolate (sugar, whole milk powder, cocoa butter, cocoa mass, emulsifier: lecithins)
